title: Turtle Wizard's Enchantments
description: Just some enchantments I thought suited Minecraft
body:
Disclaimer- This mod is still in beta so all features are subject to change and may not function as intended. Turtle Wizard's Enchantments is a mod that adds some useful and abnormal enchantments I thought suited Minecraft. The mod currently has 5 enchantments. Feel free to comment any suggestions or on any thoughts you have about the mod. Some of the mods current highlights are the enchantments Smite of Zues, Midas's Touch, and Pandora's Edge

Smite of Zues- Will have a chance to strike lightning on anyone struck by the blade

Midas's Touch- Depending on the pickaxe's enchantment level all ore mined with the pickaxe will be turned into gold nuggets, or gold ore.

Molten Touch- Will automatically smelt any ore mined
